Aatrox.advice: Dodge Q sweetspots. W him when he Qs (traps him mid-animation). Ghouls body-block Q. Post-6 with Maiden you win extended trades if he misses Q. Conqueror for sustained DPS.

Akali.advice: E max with Eclipse. She can shroud to avoid E. W her when she dashes in and shroud is down.

Akshan.advice: Ranged matchup — Second Wind. Let him push, farm under tower. W him to cancel his E swing.

Ambessa.advice: Multiple dashes but short-range. Poke with E+Aery. Disengage after E+ghouls poke.

Anivia.advice: Her wall blocks ghouls. W her — she's immobile. Kill egg with ghouls. Push hard, she has mana issues early.

Aurelion Sol.advice: He scales hard — punish early. W him when he walks up. He's immobile without flash.

Aurora.advice: E max with Eclipse. She's squishy — land E and all-in. W her when she tries to escape with R.

Briar.advice: Wall her during frenzy to trap her with ghouls. Bait W, then commit with E+W after it ends.

Camille.advice: W where she will land from E. Don't fight in her R zone without ghouls. Force extended fights with Maiden.

Cassiopeia.advice: High DPS but squishy. Don't face her (R stuns). Build MR. Farm safe, outscale in side lane.

Cho'Gath.advice: HP stacker — Liandry's burn shreds him. Dodge Q, don't stand in W silence. Out-split him hard.

Darius.advice: Poke with E+ghouls from range. W him when he uses E pull. Don't let him get 5 stacks.

Dr. Mundo.advice: He can't kill you. Dodge Q cleavers. Liandry's burn shreds his HP stacking. Split push wins.

Fiora.advice: Can't outtrade her easily. Q her every time she goes for a vital, don't go for Graves. Just Q her till she stops, back off when she uses W - if your wall shoves her during parry it stuns you. Grasp + Iceborn. She dies unlike Trynd, but riposte is brutal.

Gangplank.advice: Sundered Sky rush. He's squishy — land E and all-in. His W cleanses slow but not W wall.

Garen.advice: W him when he runs at you with Q. E+ghouls deny his passive regen. Avoid R execute at low HP.

Gnar.advice: E max with Eclipse. Back off near Mega form. W him in Mini to force all-in. Phase Rush escapes Mega.

Gragas.advice: Sundered Sky rush + Second Wind. His body slam goes through W. Grasp-2 with Manaflow and Scorch.

Gwen.advice: Her W zone makes ghouls useless inside it. Poke with E from outside W. Phase Rush gives slow resistance vs her ult/Rylai's. Conqueror for extended trades if she W's early.

Heimerdinger.advice: Turrets zone you hard. Ghouls die to turrets. Farm safely, build MR. He's immobile — call for ganks.

Illaoi.advice: DODGE HER E. If she pulls your spirit, walk away. NEVER fight in her R — walk out and re-engage.

Irelia.advice: BAN HER. Irelia's Q counts as auto, one-shots Ghouls, stacks passive -> you auto-lose. If not banned: Exhaust + Grasp, Sheen rush into anti-heal (Bramble/Executioner's early), then Iceborn or Triforce into Titanic + Frozen Heart.

Jax.advice: Dodges all our DMG but E. Dashes over wall, out-duels. ALWAYS Grasp + MS shard + Sheen rush into Iceborn. Bait his jump, W him, trade, back off, repeat till he dies. Aery + Bramble trick viable. Phase Rush: wall him as he jumps, kite when counter strike is up, fight when it's down.

Jayce.advice: Sundered Sky rush + Second Wind. He falls off hard after 15 mins. W him in melee form.

K'Sante.advice: First Strike for gold gen. W him when he dashes. His All Out (R) makes him squishy — all-in window.

Kayle.advice: ABUSE HER EARLY. Melee until 6, weak until 11. E max Eclipse. Zone her off CS. End before 16.

Kennen.advice: Ranged stun + disengage. E max + Comet/Aery. D. Shield start. Don't stack near ghouls (his ult AoE). W him when he E's in for stun.

Kled.advice: His E has a bug that one-shots pets, can dash over wall if it already hits you. Q has anti-heal, wins every trade. Can dive you easily. Too weak early to kill before he remounts. Play safe, outscale.

Malphite.advice: He pokes with Q but runs out of mana. BC shreds his armor. Push and split.

Maokai.advice: Tiny threat. He can't match your splitpush at any stage.

Mordekaiser.advice: His R steals Maiden stats. Phase Rush escapes Rylai's slow + Death Realm. Long Sword + Null-Magic Mantle start. BC first for armor shred, Force of Nature for MR + MS. Serpent's Fang if he shields.

Naafiri.advice: Her dogs die to ghouls. W her when she dashes in. Grasp for short trades. Outscale hard.

Nasus.advice: Punish early before he stacks. WARNING: ghouls give free Q stacks. Conqueror for extended fights. Adaptive shard (he's squishy early). Phase Rush to chase him down. Don't let him free-farm.

Nocturne.advice: Bait his spell shield before E. His R denies vision. Wall him after he dashes in.

Olaf.advice: He runs you down early. Don't fight 1-5. His R = unstoppable (W doesn't trap). Farm safe, outscale.

Ornn.advice: First Strike for gold gen. Dodge his E and R. Push and split but respect his CC chain.

Pantheon.advice: Empowered W stun into Q chunks hard. Bone Plating helps. He falls off after 15 mins. Survive and outscale.

Poppy.advice: Her W blocks dashes but you don't dash. Don't fight near walls (E stun). Out-split her.

Quinn.advice: E max with Eclipse. W her when she vaults in. You outscale massively. Bramble+Aery trick.

Renekton.advice: Lane Bully, dashes over wall, heals off your pets, double dashes so you can't catch him. You outscale but he snowballs harder. Be careful early, give up CS if needed. Exhaust + Unflinching. Iceborn rush for armor + slow.

Riven.advice: Iceborn rush. She dashes through W but armor + slow help. Bone Plating blocks her combo. HoB viable.

Rumble.advice: His flamespitter melts ghouls. Don't stack ghouls in Q range. MR important. W him — he's immobile.

Ryze.advice: He combos hard but is squishy. Land E and all-in. W him — no escape. Grasp-4 Approach Velocity to chase.

Sejuani.advice: Good CC but low damage. Push and take plates. Out-split all game. Respect CC chain for ganks.

Sett.advice: Dodge W true damage center. Don't stand in grit bar direction. Unflinching + Bone Plating. Tiamat -> Titanic. His E pulls you into W.

Shen.advice: Push when he ults away — free plates. His W blocks auto attacks including ghouls. Out-split him.

Singed.advice: DO NOT CHASE. W him when he runs in to fling. Push and take plates while he proxies.

Sion.advice: Dodge Q charge. W him during Q channel to cancel. HP stacker — Liandry's shreds him.

Skarner.advice: He's tanky but you outscale. Don't get dragged by R. W him to kite. Free lane.

Smolder.advice: He scales hard - punish early before stacks. E max + Comet/Aery poke. D. Shield start. He's squishy early, all-in with ghouls + Maiden post-6.

Swain.advice: Dodge E root. Build MR. Push hard — poor waveclear early. W him to deny escape.

Sylas.advice: He steals R but Maiden isn't scary for him. Grasp for short trades. Push and take plates.

Tahm Kench.advice: He's tanky with grey health but can't kill you. Don't get hit by Q tongue 3 times. Push freely.

Teemo.advice: E max Eclipse. His blind stops ghoul autos. Tiamat bypasses blind for Aery. Bramble+Aery trick. Buy Sweeper.

Trundle.advice: His R steals your stats. Conqueror + MS shard. Tiamat rush for waveclear, then BC for shred. Buy Executioner's if he finishes Ravenous Hydra. Phase Rush viable if he builds Rylai's.

Tryndamere.advice: Won't die, dashes over wall, out-DPS/outtrades you. Take Conqueror + Exhaust. Rush Tabis + HP item. If losing early finish Titanic first, then BC + armor (Randuin's/DMP). Phase Rush viable to escape his W slow. W him when he spins in, disengage when he ults (5s).

Udyr.advice: He runs fast with bear stance. W him to kite. Can't match your push. Out-split him.

Urgot.advice: Don't stand in W range. W him when he E dashes in. Track passive leg cooldowns. Don't get R executed at 25%.

Varus.advice: Brutal poke lane. Second Wind + Doran's Shield. Farm under tower. Call for ganks — no escape.

Vayne.advice: Ranged + %HP true damage. Adaptive shard (HP helps her deal MORE damage). D. Shield start + Second Wind. Bramble Vest + Aery trick. E max with Comet/Aery. Outscale at 2 items. Don't chase - W her if she tumbles in.

Vladimir.advice: His pool dodges everything. Don't waste W when pool is up. Punish early when CDs are long. Build MR.

Volibear.advice: Wins early all-ins, don't fight levels 1-3. Grasp-2 + Second Wind + Unflinching. He has stun + burst. Respect his passive damage. Outscale post-6 with Maiden.

Warwick.advice: He heals a lot below 50% — need anti-heal or burst. His R suppresses. W him when he Qs onto you. Comet poke to whittle.

Wukong.advice: Clone can bait W. Don't W until you confirm it's real. His R knockup — W to cancel R spin.

Yasuo.advice: Iceborn rush — slow field key since he dashes through ghouls. Windwall blocks E. Steelcaps reduce damage a lot.

Yone.advice: W where he'll snap back from E. MS shard critical. Tiamat -> Titanic rush. Exhaust when he all-ins. HoB viable for burst trades. Do NOT let him stack Lethal Tempo for free.

Yorick.advice: Mirror match — whoever lands E with more ghouls wins. W enemy Maiden to deny it.

Zaahen.advice: Comet poke is strong. MS shard helps with his mobility. Push and split.

Zac.advice: He's tanky with good CC. Stand on blobs to deny healing. Push and split. Respect engage for ganks.

Phase Rush.name: Phase Rush
Phase Rush.description: Mobility/kiting build for matchups where you need to disengage quickly

Grasp-1.name: Grasp-1
Grasp-1.description: Default Grasp page — good all-around for short trades and tower taking

Comet.name: Comet
Comet.description: Pet poke build — E+ghouls proc Comet for ranged harass

Conqueror.name: Conqueror
Conqueror.description: Sustained damage for extended fights vs tanks and bruisers

Aery.name: Aery
Aery.description: Aggressive poke — Aery procs more often than Comet for frequent trades

Grasp-4.name: Grasp-4
Grasp-4.description: Chase/mobility Grasp — Approach Velocity for sticking to targets after W

First Strike.name: First Strike
First Strike.description: Economy page — First Strike gold generation for scaling builds

Grasp-2.name: Grasp-2
Grasp-2.description: Poke + tenacity Grasp — Manaflow for mana, Unflinching for CC-heavy lanes

Hail of Blades.name: Hail of Blades
Hail of Blades.description: Burst attack speed — fast Q trades and quick grave generation

Grasp-3.name: Grasp-3
Grasp-3.description: Sustain Grasp — Second Wind + Taste of Blood for heavy poke lanes

Default BBC.name: Default BBC
Default BBC.description: Shojin gives pets 12% DMG Amp, Only missing 8% from Yorick's old E that gave 20% and Black Cleaver gives Ghouls everything they scale with (HP, AD, MS) and Shred, While Hull & Bastion Breaker help you Splitpush and abuse Turret plates [mobafire L449]

Iceborn Cleaver.name: Iceborn Cleaver
Iceborn Cleaver.description: Default Tank Build, Gauntlet into Cleaver or Gauntlet into Sky, Can work into most AD counters like Jax, Ren, Kled [mobafire L464]

Titanic Breaker.name: Titanic Breaker
Titanic Breaker.description: Titanic Breaker & Blood Gage — Good into Non HP/Tank Killers like Riven, Renekton, Kled, Champs that need to snowball, Sky 5th or Shojin, Sky for Sustain, Shojin for DMG [mobafire L455-456]

Shojin Hull.name: Shojin Hull
Shojin Hull.description: Full Splitpush with Lethality items to boost Bastion Breaker, Choose between Shojin or Cleaver for Scaling DMG Item [mobafire L473-474]

Iceborn Dragon.name: Iceborn Dragon
Iceborn Dragon.description: Tankier Variation of Iceborn Cleaver [mobafire L458-459]

Speed Rick.name: Speed Rick
Speed Rick.description: vs Ranged Team Comps or against Quinn, Gnar, Ryze, Cassio, etc. Choose Triforce or Tiamat into Sundered Sky first, only Buy Hull into Roaming ones like Quinn or if you can Split for free [mobafire L485-486]

Conqueror Bruiser.name: Conqueror Bruiser
Conqueror Bruiser.description: Sustained fight build — pairs with Conqueror for extended trades vs bruisers

Anti-Tank.name: Anti-Tank
Anti-Tank.description: Max armor shred vs tanks — Cleaver + Serylda's for armor pen stacking

Anti-AP.name: Anti-AP
Anti-AP.description: MR stacking vs AP-heavy lanes — Spirit Visage + Kaenic Rookern

Hexplate Engage.name: Hexplate Engage
Hexplate Engage.description: Engage build — Hexplate ult for gap closing + teamfight presence

Lethal Splitpush.name: Lethal Splitpush
Lethal Splitpush.description: Lethality Build for Splitpushing vs Heal & Shield abusers like Riven, Ambessa [mobafire L461]

Bloodmail Bruiser.name: Bloodmail Bruiser
Bloodmail Bruiser.description: Both Items give you free AD up to 150, Sterak Gives 40 to Yorick, Bloodmail gives 30 from stats then another 30-50 from HP to AD conversion. Bloodmail scales off HP and maxes out at 30% HP, Sterak also Procs the shield at 30% [mobafire L505]

Full Armor.name: Full Armor
Full Armor.description: VS Full AD Team — auto attackers get Thornmail, crits get Omen, high AS melee get Frozen Heart, DD into Sterak if needed [mobafire L531-532]

Full MR.name: Full MR
Full MR.description: VS Full AP or Heavy Magic DMG — vs AP Burst like LB/Zoe/Annie go Rookern + Sterak, against APs that slowly kill go FoN into Jak'Sho or Rookern [mobafire L528-529]

GA Revive.name: GA Revive
GA Revive.description: Last Item Always when LATE GAME (Ghouls stay Alive as you revive). Replace with Sterak's later if you have gold, Sell Hullbreaker if game may end if you lose fight [mobafire L491]

Unending Despair.name: Unending Despair
Unending Despair.description: Drain tank — Unending Despair aura + Spirit Visage amplified healing

Eclipse Poke.name: Eclipse Poke
Eclipse Poke.description: E max into Eclipse & Shojin with Comet or Aery Rune. Works into range top: Teemo, Aurora, Akali, Kayle, Gnar, Quinn, etc. [mobafire L1647]

Sundered Sky Rush.name: Sundered Sky Rush
Sundered Sky Rush.description: Sky Dragon's Sustain — Fighter Tank Build for aggressive Yorick Mains. Go Sky first if Hard Matchup, Shojin First otherwise [mobafire L467-468]

Liandry Tank Shred.name: Liandry Tank Shred
Liandry Tank Shred.description: Hybrid Monk — Beats any Tank, if Ahead BC into Eclipse, if they rush HP or you're behind BC into Liandry instead, good into Cho'Gath, Tahmkench, Ornn, Mundo, Nasus. Can solo kill Darius, Illaoi, Ornn when Maiden is released [mobafire L482-483]

Bonk Shovel.name: Bonk Shovel
Bonk Shovel.description: Old Classic Build, Best Splitpush Build VS Towers and most ranged champs. Sky + Deadmans beats Ranged champs, Really good in low elo, good into most fighters top like Yone or Yasuo [mobafire L476]

Voidborn Dragon.name: Voidborn Dragon
Voidborn Dragon.description: AP DMG AMP version of Double Pen Build, AP Fighter Tank. Shred Tanks and Amplify your DMG by 26%, Heal for 10% Omnivamp and Increase E's %HP DMG per 100 AP, While Riftmaker Converts your HP Into AP [mobafire L479]

Hullbreakin Dat Ashe.name: Hullbreakin Dat Ashe
Hullbreakin Dat Ashe.description: Choose Between Triforce or Shojin. Splitpush-focused with movespeed and waveclear [mobafire L470]

Maiden Push.name: Maiden Push
Maiden Push.description: Not a Full build, just items that work when releasing Maiden or Ghouls in sidelane. Maiden & Ghouls can proc Eclipse & Liandry to lower enemies HP, while Malignance lowers Maiden Cooldown and deals DMG [mobafire L488]

VS Jax (Iceborn).name: VS Jax (Iceborn)
VS Jax (Iceborn).description: VS Jax Grasp path — Sheen rush into Iceborn for slow field + armor. BC or Shojin 2nd for shred/DMG, Spirit Visage 3rd for sustain + MR vs his hybrid damage. W him when he Counter Strikes to trap him until it expires [mobafire L537-538].

VS Jax (Shojin).name: VS Jax (Shojin)
VS Jax (Shojin).description: VS Jax Shojin-first path — rush Shojin for 12% pet DMG amp then Iceborn second. Works with Conqueror or Comet for poke-heavy lane. Abyssal Mask handles his hybrid damage. Poke with E+ghouls, W his Counter Strike [mobafire L540-541].

VS Morde.name: VS Morde
VS Morde.description: VS Mordekaiser — BC first for armor shred, FoN for magic damage reduction + MS, Shojin for pet DMG amp, DMP for movespeed. Serpent's Fang situational to break his passive shield. Null-Magic Mantle early for MR. Don't have Maiden out when he Rs you [mobafire L543-544].

VS Trundle.name: VS Trundle
VS Trundle.description: VS Trundle — Tiamat rush into BC for shred, Titanic for waveclear, Hull for splitpush. Buy Executioner's Calling if he finishes Ravenous Hydra (anti-heal his lifesteal). BOTRK good 4th+ item for his high HP. His R steals your stats — don't ult first [mobafire L546-547].

VS Trynd (Conqueror).name: VS Trynd (Conqueror)
VS Trynd (Conqueror).description: VS Tryndamere Conqueror path — BC + Titanic for sustained DPS, Randuin's to reduce his crits. Executioner's early if he heals too much. Exhaust is mandatory — save it for his R. W him when he spins in, disengage when he ults [mobafire L549-550].

VS Irelia.name: VS Irelia
VS Irelia.description: VS Irelia — Trinity for Sheen proc + dueling, Titanic for waveclear, Frozen Heart to cripple her AS-reliant kit (Q resets need attack speed). Buy Bramble Vest or Executioner's early to cut her Q healing. BOTRK good additional item for stat value. Her Q one-shots ghouls — W to cancel Q chain [mobafire L552-553].

VS Trynd (Iceborn Old).name: VS Trynd (Iceborn Old)
VS Trynd (Iceborn Old).description: VS Tryndamere Iceborn tank path — Iceborn slow field kites him, BC shreds armor, DMP for movespeed to escape his R duration. Old reliable tank path. Buy Executioner's if needed for his Q heal [mobafire L555-556].

VS Ranged Top.name: VS Ranged Top
VS Ranged Top.description: VS Ranged Top (Teemo, Vayne, Kennen, etc.) — Doran's Shield start for sustain. Shojin for pet DMG amp, BC for shred, Sky for sustain on catches, Hull for split pressure. Aery + Bramble Vest: their autos trigger Bramble which triggers Aery for free poke. Max E [mobafire L534-535].

Default Titanic Path.name: Default Titanic Path
Default Titanic Path.description: Default Titanic Path — BC for shred, Titanic for waveclear + HP scaling, Hull for splitpush. Good all-around path when you want waveclear + splitting power. Works with Conqueror for sustained trades.
